[[File:Clover Vender.png|300px|left]]

==Clover Vendor Info==
The Lucky Clover event occurs during the [[Alchemy_Furnace#Weekly_Wishing_Event|Wish Week]] event.
# Use lucky Coins to draw random Rewards.
# For every Lucky Coin used, Luck +1. The higher you Luck, the better the chance at hitting the jackpot.
# When your Luck reaches 150, you are guaranteed the grand prize. Upon hitting the jackpot, your Luck will be reset.
# Your Lucky Coins and Luck roll over to the next Clover Vendor event.
==Lucky Box Reward==
The Lucky Box can be refreshed when all the current rewards are claimed!<br>
[[File:Lucky Box Reward.jpeg|200px]]Robot Ticket x10, [[Energy Missile]] Frag x40, Relic RF x60
{{clear}}
==Lucky Gift==
How to earn more Lucky Coins.

===Wishmaking Bonus===
Make wishes to win rewards in the event!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Wishes
!Lucky Coins
|-
|30
|5
|-
|60
|5
|-
|90
|5
|-
|120
|5
|-
|150
|5
|-
|180
|5
|-
|210
|5
|-
|240
|5
|-
|270
|5
|-
|300
|5
|}

===Arcane Point Gift===
For each Mystery Ash obtained, point +1!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Arcane Point
!Lucky Coins
|-
|1,000
|1
|-
|2,000
|1
|-
|3,000
|1
|-
|4,000
|2
|-
|5,000
|2
|-
|6,000
|2
|-
|7,000
|3
|-
|8,000
|3
|-
|9,000
|4
|-
|10,000
|4
|}

==Buy Lucky Coin==
{|class=wikitable
!Price
!Rewards
!Times Available
|-
|300 Taichi Fish
|Lucky Coin x1
|5
|-
|$9.99
|Lucky Coin x6
|3
|-
|$19.99
|Lucky Coin x12
|1
|-
|$49.99
|Lucky Coin x30
|1
|}

[[Category:Alchemy Furnace]]
[[Category:Events]]
